query_title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Time Crash
recommendations.overview: After Martha Jones parts company with the Doctor, his TARDIS collides with another, and he comes face to face with one of his previous incarnations.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Snowmen
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Adventure, Science Fiction, Drama, Family

recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, TV Movie, Action

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Doctor and Clara face their Last Christmas. Trapped on an Arctic base, under attack from terrifying creatures, who are you going to call? Santa Claus!

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When disaster hits the Titanic, the Doctor uncovers a threat to the whole human race. Battling alongside aliens, saboteurs, robot Angels and a new friend called Astrid, can he stop the Christmas inferno?

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.
